programmes.show_description: Alex Baker brings you the best, most sing-a-longable, rock party bangers of all time. If you love Green Day, The Foo Fighters, Bon Jovi and BMTH, then you are in for a treat!
Turn your amp up to 11 & make your mic roar! Here come 25 of the greatest 00s rock karaoke tracks. Featuring The Killers, Fall Out Boy, Arctic Monkeys & many more!
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
In order, an hour of every song a number 1 rock song in the noughties!
Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring The White Stripes, Iron Maiden, Evanescense & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Mark Goodier with a countdown of bands and artists who've had one rock song that has been viewed over a billion times since the 00s.
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!
Standby to pay homage to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced! From Grace Slick and Christine McVie to Ozzy Osbourne and Jimi Hendrix.
Your weekend anthems and the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.
Nicky brings you rock gods & goddesses who unleash pure power delivering 25 of the most amazing riffs that are firmly etched into rock DNA forever!
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Over 7 hours and 3 decades of classic rock anthems back to back! Starting with Bon Jovi, Billy Idol & ZZ Top through to Razorlight, Green Day & the Foo Fighters!
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
Rounding off the week with rock classics and anthems! We guarantee AC/DC, Nirvana, Queen, Meat Loaf, Bon Jovi & much more!
One hour of pure laid back tracks and big power ballads from the 80s, every song with a huge chorus! Expect plenty of Foreigner, Toto, U2 and Heart.
The Biggest Ballads from the royals of rock! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Nickleback & Evanescence.
25 years of classic rock from an era where the look was nearly as important as the music! From Led Zeppelin in 1970 to Def Leppard in 1995.
The Biggest Ballads from the royals of rock! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Nickleback & Evanescence.
Nicky brings a masterclass in the most popular (& dangerous) subject in rock history! 20 songs loaded with lust, desire, breakups & despair - this is how love really does bite!
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Starting in 2006 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Fall Out Boy!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
We open the high school year book with Weezer in 1995 and remember the amazing bands that rocked every school party through to 2005!
Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest heroes with the rock music that defined the 00s! Blink, MCR, Razorlight and Kings of Leon are all in the top 10 - but who's at number 1?
A definitive selection of rock and indie anthems from the 2010s! Starting with My Chemical Romance in 2010 right through to Liam Gallagher at the end of the decade.
